name: Trafalgar Law - OP10-119 (Reprint)
effect_text: [On Play] Reveal up to 1 "Supernovas" type Character card from your hand and add it to the top of your Life cards face-down. Then, give up to 1 rested DON!! card to 1 of your "Supernovas" type Leader.Disclaimer: This card was reprinted from the original set with changes to the copyright information (Note: the original print did not include "EN" at the end of the copyright).
